name: Privado
description: Privado — Static code analysis tool for data privacy discovering PII flows across microservices and APIs.

seo.title: Privado — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: Privado: Privado — Static code analysis tool for data privacy discovering PII flows across microservices and APIs.

when_to_use: Static code analysis discovering PII flows across microservices
Data privacy compliance scanning in CI/CD pipelines
Identifying undocumented PII usage in legacy codebases
Developer-first privacy tooling for security-conscious teams
GDPR compliance automation with code-level PII scanning

pros: Static analysis finds PII flows in code
Shifts privacy left into CI pipelines
cons: False positives common in complex codebases
Narrow scope, just one piece of privacy stack
Needs tuning per codebase to be useful
review.verdict: Interesting static analysis angle on privacy, best paired with a broader data governance platform.
review.best_for: Engineering teams catching PII leaks in code before merge via CI checks
review.not_for: Teams needing full consent, DSR, and governance, not just code-level PII checks
